productOptionsHtml:
Use this section for ordering rules: style number, price band, minimums, and stated production time from the supplier catalog. Final invoice may reflect decoration, proofs, rush, or freight.

FieldValue
Style #618
List price range$16.00 – $17.50 USD
Minimum quantity50
Stated production time10 days

Quantity pricing (USD)

Price per unit at each order-quantity break (from the live product page).

QuantityPrice (each)
50$17.50 each
100$17.00 each
250$16.50 each
500$16.00 each

Catalog highlights

  • Includes a Full Color Imprint on 2 Sides
  • Plastic Condiment/Napkin Caddy
  • USA Made
  • Available in 4 Colors
  • Point-of-Purchase Advertising

Patch options (supplier)

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

Less than Minimum ▼

A charge will be added for orders below 1st column catalog quantities. Absolute minimum varies by product, please call for details. One color imprint only.

LTM

Overruns & Underruns ▼

We make every effort to ship the quantity ordered however due to imprinting variations we reserve the right to ship 10% over or under the quantity ordered and bill accordingly. For exact quantity orders add $30.00(g). Orders will be rounded to the next full case packing and billed accordingly to prevent damage in transit.

Over/Under

Rush Service ▼

Must be confirmed and approved by Prorose, pending product availability and production capability. Shipping times are from the receipt of order and approved art. Add $95.00(v) for 5 to 9 day shipping Add $150.00(v) for less than 5 day shipping

Rush Charges

Add $75.00 (G) for 5-9 day rush service and add $125.00 (G) for 1 - 4 day super rush service. All rush service orders must be first confirmed with the factory and will be pending availability and production capability.

Re-Order Setup Charge-30 (V) ▼

Price is based on an exact re-order.

No line choices listed—contact the studio for this add-on.

Pre-Production Proof ▼

Costs are $80(v) per logo + Setups + the cost of the product. NOTE: Costs can vary and are not available on all products, please check for availability.

No line choices listed—contact the studio for this add-on.

Final quote may reflect selected options, proofs, rush, or freight beyond list pricing.
salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Plastic Condiment Caddy w/Handle. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style 618 on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 10 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 50 units (per catalog line).
